title: Optimization Dynamics on Representational Collapse
points: Researched **representational collapse (“Tunnel Effect”)** in deep neural networks by analyzing optimization dynamics across MLP, VGG-19, and ResNet architectures using PyTorch and CIFAR-10.

Implemented and compared multiple optimizers including SGD, AdamW, and Muon, using techniques such as **linear probing**, **CKA similarity**, and **singular value spectrum analysis** to study feature compression and rank collapse.
label: NEW!

title: MRI Denoising with Collaborative Non-Local Means
points: Reproduced and extended the **MRI denoising method Collaborative Non-Local Means** on the BrainWeb dataset.

Accelerated the pipeline through **vectorization** and experimented with **alternative weighting functions** and **adaptive patch/search window selection** to improve PSNR up to 40.75 db and SSIM up to 0.97.
label: NEW!

title: Optimization of Convolution Kernels with CUDA
points: **Optimized CUDA CNN convolution kernels** using output parallelism, shared/constant memory, channel blocking, memory coalescing, and occupancy tuning on NVIDIA V100.
Achieved 341× speedup over a single-threaded CPU baseline (13.6 ms → 0.0398 ms) through profiling-driven kernel optimization and occupancy analysis with Nsight Compute.

title: SAIT, Study Abroad Information for Taiwanese Students
points: Built a **similarity-based admission analysis tool** to recommend relevant study abroad cases using weighted embedding.
Improved UI/UX for better delivery of information of posts from PTT, the largest bulletin board system in Taiwan.

title: GUI-ASFormer, Detecting Keyframes in Graphical User Interface Videos
points: Designed a **Transformer-based framework** for segmenting actions in GUI videos by enhancing ASFormer with a two-stream encoder, high-resolution embeddings, frame differencing, and multiscale temporal convolutions.
Achieved up to +7.1 improvement in F1@50 and +6.8 in edit distance over baseline ASFormer.

title: Job Postings Searching System
points: Implemented an **information retrieval system** that uses user profiles as queries to match relevant job postings.
Applied **NLP techniques**, including text classification, semantic similarity, and ranking models, resulting in a 67% improvement in NDCG score over the baseline model.

title: NanoCircDx - IGEM Competition Gold Award Project
points: **Vice Captain and Dry Lab Member** of team NTHU_Taiwan.
Contributed to the design of a colorectal cancer detection kit utilizing circRNA with PCRD and colorimetric test.
Devised **ML models for automatic kit detection and result recognition** with accuracy over 0.8 and embedded the model into a mobile app using Flutter.
